objective: Plan immutable pursuit definitions, exact component resolution, Skill separation, GoalKernel grounding, harness resolution, and tool contracts.
falsifiable_claim: Two runs can reuse immutable definitions without shared live state, replacement preserves GoalRun identity, and definitions or instructions cannot execute or grant authority.
exit_criteria: Two runs reuse immutable definitions without shared live state and exact component resolution remains frozen.
Harness or tool replacement preserves GoalRun identity; definition and instruction artifacts cannot execute or grant authority.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M3_PURSUIT_DEFINITION_RESOLUTION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute mutable definitions, Skill installation versus activation, harness adapter, tool contract, component snapshot, GoalRun identity, and instruction content across runs.
remaining_nonclaims: No room, collective pursuit, acceptance, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
